[/p]

body_text:
On April 3 watch Dante, a devil hunter with legendary strength take on demons with style when the new series “Devil May Cry” arrives on Netflix!

announcement_body.headline: The New Series “Devil May Cry” Exclusive on Netflix!
announcement_body.body:
[previewyoutube=OlEqHXRrcpc;full][/previewyoutube]
[h3]On April 3 watch Dante, a devil hunter with legendary strength take on demons with style when the new series [url=https://www.netflix.com/title/81506915]“Devil May Cry”[/url] arrives on Netflix![/h3]

subtitle: see announcement body
body_text:
Save on Resident Evil Village and other great Resident Evil titles from July 24th, 2023 @ 10 am PDT to August 7th, 2023 @ 10 am PDT!
Don't forget to check out the new digital release of RESIDENT EVIL: DEATH ISLAND on July 25th!
https://www.sonypictures.com/movies/residentevildeathisland
Also, don't miss our other sale going on right now!
https://store.steampowered.com/developer/capcom/sale/evo

announcement_body.headline: Capcom Summer Sale
announcement_body.body:
[img]{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/33273264/5a7ba3a2d906f80ca572a73694d820f28f0a0163.jpg[/img]
[b]Save up to 87% on select CAPCOM games from June 29th through July 13th during the Capcom Summer Sale![/b]

subtitle: see announcement body
body_text:
Tune in for the Capcom Showcase – a digital event bringing you the latest Capcom updates!
We look forward to sharing new information about Capcom's upcoming releases and future titles with our fans around the world!
Broadcast Schedule
Monday, June 12, 2023, 3:00 PM PDT
- The runtime will be approximately 36 minutes.
- The date and time of the event may change without prior notice.
- Some of the games included in the show aren't suitable for children.
About
What is the Capcom Showcase?
The Capcom Showcase is a global digital livestream event.
It's a gathering place for us to share the latest, most in-depth Capcom information with our fans around the world.
Featured Games
https://store.steampowered.com/app/1967430/Ghost_Trick_Phantom_Detective/
https://store.steampowered.com/app/1286320/Exoprimal?snr=1_1056_615_thanniversary_100704
https://store.steampowered.com/app/2054970/Dragons_Dogma_2/
We hope you'll join us for this special digital event to celebrate Capcom's 40th anniversary!
https://www.capcom-games.com/showcase/en-us/
Discord: https://discord.gg/Capcom
Twitch: https://www.twitch.tv/CapcomUSA
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@capcom
Twitter: https://twitter.com/CapcomUSA_
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/CapcomUSA
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/CapcomUSA

The Capcom Showcase is a global digital livestream event.
It's a gathering place for us to share the latest, most in-depth Capcom information with our fans around the world.

[h1][b]Featured Games[/b][/h1]
https://store.steampowered.com/app/1967430/Ghost_Trick_Phantom_Detective/
https://store.steampowered.com/app/1286320/Exoprimal?snr=1_1056_615_thanniversary_100704
https://store.steampowered.com/app/2054970/Dragons_Dogma_2/

[h2]We hope you'll join us for this special digital event to celebrate Capcom's 40th anniversary![/h2]

subtitle: see announcement body
body_text:
Save up to 87% on select CAPCOM games from June 6th through June 20th during the Capcom 40th Anniversary Sale!
Tune in for the Capcom Showcase – a digital event bringing you the latest Capcom updates!
We look forward to sharing new information about Capcom's upcoming releases and future titles with our fans around the world!

announcement_body.headline: Capcom 40th Anniversary Sale
announcement_body.body:
[img]{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/33273264/3ba878da7a16de729bf99cd56640dcdb8e93fa9e.jpg[/img]
[b]Save up to 87% on select CAPCOM games from June 6th through June 20th during the Capcom 40th Anniversary Sale!

Tune in for the Capcom Showcase – a digital event bringing you the latest Capcom updates!
We look forward to sharing new information about Capcom's upcoming releases and future titles with our fans around the world![/b]

announcement_body.headline: Capcom Lunar New Year Sale
announcement_body.body: [img]{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/33273264/eccec15ffd4bbe69b34b99297eca1d220f89b962.jpg[/img][b]Start the new year with big savings of up to 87% on select titles from Jan 19th, 2023, at 10 AM PST to Jan 31st, 2023, at 10 AM PST during the CAPCOM Lunar New Year Sale![/b]

subtitle: see announcement body
body_text:
Save up to 87% on select Capcom games from Dec 22nd, 2022, at 10 am PST to Jan 5th, 2023, at 10 am PST during the Capcom Holiday Sale!
Also, don't forget to vote for Monster Hunter Rise for the "Better With Friends" category in the Steam Awards!

announcement_body.headline: Capcom Holiday Sale
announcement_body.body:
[img]{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/33273264/9788cf6b69b123379baba9f49357b208b4372c24.jpg[/img]
[b]Save up to 87% on select Capcom games from Dec 22nd, 2022, at 10 am PST to Jan 5th, 2023, at 10 am PST during the Capcom Holiday Sale!

Also, don't forget to vote for Monster Hunter Rise for the "Better With Friends" category in the Steam Awards! [/b]

announcement_body.headline: Capcom Single's Day Sale
announcement_body.body:
[img]{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/33273264/bb632c72e600fc6a031977949ac190fd2ee9d48d.jpg[/img]
[b]Save up to 84% on Capcom games from November 10th @ 10 am PST through November 22nd @ 10 am PST during the Capcom Single’s Day Sale![/b]

subtitle: see announcement body
body_text: For a limited time, get the Resident Evil Halloween Bundle or save on Resident Evil Village and other great Resident Evil titles from October 19th, 2022 @ 10 am PDT to November 1st, 2022 @ 10 am PDT during the Capcom Halloween Sale!
